# C4 Container Diagram: iptrace

**Layer**: L2 — Containers  
**Trigger**: Multiple processes (CLI process, kernel Netfilter subsystem, optional external daemons)  
**Generated by**: speckit-architect skill  

```mermaid
C4Container
  title Container Diagram — iptrace

  Person(user, "Linux 运维工程师")

  Container_Boundary(iptrace_bin, "iptrace 二进制") {
    Container(cmd, "cmd/iptrace", "Go", "CLI 入口点：参数解析（stdlib flag）、子命令路由")
    Container(backend_detect, "internal/backend", "Go", "后端检测：识别 iptables-legacy / iptables-nft / firewalld")
    Container(parser, "internal/parser", "Go", "规则解析器：将 iptables-save 文本解析为 RuleSet 内存结构")
    Container(matcher, "internal/matcher", "Go", "离线推演引擎：遍历 RuleSet、处理 JUMP/RETURN/默认策略")
    Container(tracer, "internal/tracer", "Go", "在线追踪器：绑定 AF_NETLINK 套接字，读取 NFLOG 事件，注入/清理 xt_TRACE 规则")
    Container(exporter, "internal/exporter", "Go", "规则快照导出：调用 iptables-save 或 firewall-cmd，写入目标文件")
    Container(output_fmt, "internal/output", "Go", "输出格式化：human（text/tabwriter）和 JSON（encoding/json）双模式")
  }

  System_Ext(kernel_nf, "Linux Kernel / Netfilter", "NFLOG 事件源，xt_TRACE 规则执行点")
  System_Ext(iptables_cmd, "iptables-save / iptables-nft-save", "用户态命令，输出规则文本")
  System_Ext(firewalld_cmd, "firewall-cmd", "firewalld 管理接口")
  System_Ext(rules_file, "规则快照文件", "iptables-save 格式文本文件")

  Rel(user, cmd, "执行命令", "CLI")
  Rel(cmd, backend_detect, "检测后端类型")
  Rel(cmd, parser, "加载规则文件（check 子命令）")
  Rel(cmd, matcher, "执行离线推演（check 子命令）")
  Rel(cmd, tracer, "启动在线追踪（trace 子命令）")
  Rel(cmd, exporter, "触发规则导出（export 子命令）")
  Rel(matcher, output_fmt, "渲染 TraceResult")
  Rel(tracer, output_fmt, "流式渲染 TraceStep 事件")
  Rel(exporter, output_fmt, "渲染导出摘要")
  Rel(backend_detect, iptables_cmd, "检测版本 / 调用导出", "os/exec")
  Rel(backend_detect, firewalld_cmd, "检测服务状态", "os/exec")
  Rel(tracer, kernel_nf, "读取 NFLOG 事件", "AF_NETLINK / NETLINK_NETFILTER")
  Rel(exporter, iptables_cmd, "执行 iptables-save", "os/exec")
  Rel(exporter, firewalld_cmd, "执行 firewall-cmd --list-all-zones", "os/exec")
  Rel(parser, rules_file, "读取规则快照文件", "文件 I/O")
  Rel(exporter, rules_file, "写入规则快照文件", "文件 I/O")
```
